# Test Case Design - BodyControl

High-level test cases for the **BodyControl** architecture model. Body Control Module: exterior/interior lighting, doors, wipers, windows and mirrors.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - lighting init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Bcm_Lighting_Init` then `Bcm_Lighting_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-BCM-LIG7)
